ayahs.arabic: قٓۚ وَٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ ٱلۡمَجِيدِ
ayahs.translation: Qaf. By the honored Qur'an
ayahs.transliteration: Qaf waalqurani almajeedi

ayahs.arabic: بَلۡ عَجِبُوٓاْ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرٞ مِّنۡهُمۡ فَقَالَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ هَٰذَا شَيۡءٌ عَجِيبٌ
ayahs.translation: But they wonder that there has come to them a warner from among themselves, and the disbelievers say, "This is an amazing thing
ayahs.transliteration: Bal AAajiboo an jaahum munthirun minhum faqala alkafiroona hatha shayon AAajeebun

ayahs.arabic: أَءِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابٗاۖ ذَٰلِكَ رَجۡعُۢ بَعِيدٞ
ayahs.translation: When we have died and have become dust, [we will return to life]? That is a distant return
ayahs.transliteration: Aitha mitna wakunna turaban thalika rajAAun baAAeedun

ayahs.arabic: قَدۡ عَلِمۡنَا مَا تَنقُصُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ مِنۡهُمۡۖ وَعِندَنَا كِتَٰبٌ حَفِيظُۢ
ayahs.translation: We know what the earth diminishes of them, and with Us is a retaining record
ayahs.transliteration: Qad AAalimna ma tanqusu alardu minhum waAAindana kitabun hafeethun

ayahs.arabic: بَلۡ كَذَّبُواْ بِٱلۡحَقِّ لَمَّا جَآءَهُمۡ فَهُمۡ فِيٓ أَمۡرٖ مَّرِيجٍ
ayahs.translation: But they denied the truth when it came to them, so they are in a confused condition
ayahs.transliteration: Bal kaththaboo bialhaqqi lamma jaahum fahum fee amrin mareejin

ayahs.arabic: أَفَلَمۡ يَنظُرُوٓاْ إِلَى ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَوۡقَهُمۡ كَيۡفَ بَنَيۡنَٰهَا وَزَيَّنَّـٰهَا وَمَا لَهَا مِن فُرُوجٖ
ayahs.translation: Have they not looked at the heaven above them - how We structured it and adorned it and [how] it has no rifts
ayahs.transliteration: Afalam yanthuroo ila alssamai fawqahum kayfa banaynaha wazayyannaha wama laha min furoojin

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ مَدَدۡنَٰهَا وَأَلۡقَيۡنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِيَ وَأَنۢبَتۡنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوۡجِۭ بَهِيجٖ
ayahs.translation: And the earth - We spread it out and cast therein firmly set mountains and made grow therein [something] of every beautiful kind
ayahs.transliteration: Waalarda madadnaha waalqayna feeha rawasiya waanbatna feeha min kulli zawjin baheejin

ayahs.arabic: تَبۡصِرَةٗ وَذِكۡرَىٰ لِكُلِّ عَبۡدٖ مُّنِيبٖ
ayahs.translation: Giving insight and a reminder for every servant who turns [to Allah]
ayahs.transliteration: Tabsiratan wathikra likulli AAabdin muneebin

ayahs.arabic: وَنَزَّلۡنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ مُّبَٰرَكٗا فَأَنۢبَتۡنَا بِهِۦ جَنَّـٰتٖ وَحَبَّ ٱلۡحَصِيدِ
ayahs.translation: And We have sent down blessed rain from the sky and made grow thereby gardens and grain from the harvest
ayahs.transliteration: Wanazzalna mina alssamai maan mubarakan faanbatna bihi jannatin wahabba alhaseedi

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلنَّخۡلَ بَاسِقَٰتٖ لَّهَا طَلۡعٞ نَّضِيدٞ
ayahs.translation: And lofty palm trees having fruit arranged in layers
ayahs.transliteration: Waalnnakhla basiqatin laha talAAun nadeedun

ayahs.arabic: رِّزۡقٗا لِّلۡعِبَادِۖ وَأَحۡيَيۡنَا بِهِۦ بَلۡدَةٗ مَّيۡتٗاۚ كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡخُرُوجُ
ayahs.translation: As provision for the servants, and We have given life thereby to a dead land. Thus is the resurrection
ayahs.transliteration: Rizqan lilAAibadi waahyayna bihi baldatan maytan kathalika alkhurooju

ayahs.arabic: كَذَّبَتۡ قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمُ نُوحٖ وَأَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلرَّسِّ وَثَمُودُ
ayahs.translation: The people of Noah denied before them, and the companions of the well and Thamud
ayahs.transliteration: Kaththabat qablahum qawmu noohin waashabu alrrassi wathamoodu

ayahs.arabic: وَعَادٞ وَفِرۡعَوۡنُ وَإِخۡوَٰنُ لُوطٖ
ayahs.translation: And 'Aad and Pharaoh and the brothers of Lot
ayahs.transliteration: WaAAadun wafirAAawnu waikhwanu lootin

ayahs.arabic: وَأَصۡحَٰبُ ٱلۡأَيۡكَةِ وَقَوۡمُ تُبَّعٖۚ كُلّٞ كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ وَعِيدِ
ayahs.translation: And the companions of the thicket and the people of Tubba'. All denied the messengers, so My threat was justly fulfilled
ayahs.transliteration: Waashabu alaykati waqawmu tubbaAAin kullun kaththaba alrrusula fahaqqa waAAeedi

ayahs.arabic: أَفَعَيِينَا بِٱلۡخَلۡقِ ٱلۡأَوَّلِۚ بَلۡ هُمۡ فِي لَبۡسٖ مِّنۡ خَلۡقٖ جَدِيدٖ
ayahs.translation: Did We fail in the first creation? But they are in confusion over a new creation
ayahs.transliteration: AfaAAayeena bialkhalqi alawwali bal hum fee labsin min khalqin jadeedin

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ وَنَعۡلَمُ مَا تُوَسۡوِسُ بِهِۦ نَفۡسُهُۥۖ وَنَحۡنُ أَقۡرَبُ إِلَيۡهِ مِنۡ حَبۡلِ ٱلۡوَرِيدِ
ayahs.translation: And We have already created man and know what his soul whispers to him, and We are closer to him than [his] jugular vein
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad khalaqna alinsana wanaAAlamu ma tuwaswisu bihi nafsuhu wanahnu aqrabu ilayhi min habli alwareedi

ayahs.arabic: إِذۡ يَتَلَقَّى ٱلۡمُتَلَقِّيَانِ عَنِ ٱلۡيَمِينِ وَعَنِ ٱلشِّمَالِ قَعِيدٞ
ayahs.translation: When the two receivers receive, seated on the right and on the left
ayahs.transliteration: Ith yatalaqqa almutalaqqiyani AAani alyameeni waAAani alshshimali qaAAeedun

ayahs.arabic: مَّا يَلۡفِظُ مِن قَوۡلٍ إِلَّا لَدَيۡهِ رَقِيبٌ عَتِيدٞ
ayahs.translation: Man does not utter any word except that with him is an observer prepared [to record]
ayahs.transliteration: Ma yalfithu min qawlin illa ladayhi raqeebun AAateedun

ayahs.arabic: وَجَآءَتۡ سَكۡرَةُ ٱلۡمَوۡتِ بِٱلۡحَقِّۖ ذَٰلِكَ مَا كُنتَ مِنۡهُ تَحِيدُ
ayahs.translation: And the intoxication of death will bring the truth; that is what you were trying to avoid
ayahs.transliteration: Wajaat sakratu almawti bialhaqqi thalika ma kunta minhu taheedu

ayahs.arabic: وَنُفِخَ فِي ٱلصُّورِۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوۡمُ ٱلۡوَعِيدِ
ayahs.translation: And the Horn will be blown. That is the Day of [carrying out] the threat
ayahs.transliteration: Wanufikha fee alssoori thalika yawmu alwaAAeedi

ayahs.arabic: وَجَآءَتۡ كُلُّ نَفۡسٖ مَّعَهَا سَآئِقٞ وَشَهِيدٞ
ayahs.translation: And every soul will come, with it a driver and a witness
ayahs.transliteration: Wajaat kullu nafsin maAAaha saiqun washaheedun

ayahs.arabic: لَّقَدۡ كُنتَ فِي غَفۡلَةٖ مِّنۡ هَٰذَا فَكَشَفۡنَا عَنكَ غِطَآءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ ٱلۡيَوۡمَ حَدِيدٞ
ayahs.translation: [It will be said], "You were certainly in unmindfulness of this, and We have removed from you your cover, so your sight, this Day, is sharp
ayahs.transliteration: Laqad kunta fee ghaflatin min hatha fakashafna AAanka ghitaaka fabasaruka alyawma hadeedun

ayahs.arabic: وَقَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ هَٰذَا مَا لَدَيَّ عَتِيدٌ
ayahs.translation: And his companion, [the angel], will say, "This [record] is what is with me, prepared
ayahs.transliteration: Waqala qareenuhu hatha ma ladayya AAateedun

ayahs.arabic: أَلۡقِيَا فِي جَهَنَّمَ كُلَّ كَفَّارٍ عَنِيدٖ
ayahs.translation: [Allah will say], "Throw into Hell every obstinate disbeliever
ayahs.transliteration: Alqiya fee jahannama kulla kaffarin AAaneedin

ayahs.arabic: مَّنَّاعٖ لِّلۡخَيۡرِ مُعۡتَدٖ مُّرِيبٍ
ayahs.translation: Preventer of good, aggressor, and doubter
ayahs.transliteration: MannaAAin lilkhayri muAAtadin mureebin

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَأَلۡقِيَاهُ فِي ٱلۡعَذَابِ ٱلشَّدِيدِ
ayahs.translation: Who made [as equal] with Allah another deity; then throw him into the severe punishment
ayahs.transliteration: Allathee jaAAala maAAa Allahi ilahan akhara faalqiyahu fee alAAathabi alshshadeedi

ayahs.arabic: ۞قَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ رَبَّنَا مَآ أَطۡغَيۡتُهُۥ وَلَٰكِن كَانَ فِي ضَلَٰلِۭ بَعِيدٖ
ayahs.translation: His [devil] companion will say, "Our Lord, I did not make him transgress, but he [himself] was in extreme error
ayahs.transliteration: Qala qareenuhu rabbana ma atghaytuhu walakin kana fee dalalin baAAeedin

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ لَا تَخۡتَصِمُواْ لَدَيَّ وَقَدۡ قَدَّمۡتُ إِلَيۡكُم بِٱلۡوَعِيدِ
ayahs.translation: [Allah] will say, "Do not dispute before Me, while I had already presented to you the warning
ayahs.transliteration: Qala la takhtasimoo ladayya waqad qaddamtu ilaykum bialwaAAeedi

ayahs.arabic: مَا يُبَدَّلُ ٱلۡقَوۡلُ لَدَيَّ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ بِظَلَّـٰمٖ لِّلۡعَبِيدِ
ayahs.translation: The word will not be changed with Me, and never will I be unjust to the servants
ayahs.transliteration: Ma yubaddalu alqawlu ladayya wama ana bithallamin lilAAabeedi

ayahs.arabic: يَوۡمَ نَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ ٱمۡتَلَأۡتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلۡ مِن مَّزِيدٖ
ayahs.translation: On the Day We will say to Hell, "Have you been filled?" and it will say, "Are there some more
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma naqoolu lijahannama hali imtalati wataqoolu hal min mazeedin

ayahs.arabic: وَأُزۡلِفَتِ ٱلۡجَنَّةُ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ غَيۡرَ بَعِيدٍ
ayahs.translation: And Paradise will be brought near to the righteous, not far
ayahs.transliteration: Waozlifati aljannatu lilmuttaqeena ghayra baAAeedin

ayahs.arabic: هَٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِكُلِّ أَوَّابٍ حَفِيظٖ
ayahs.translation: [It will be said], "This is what you were promised - for every returner [to Allah] and keeper [of His covenant]
ayahs.transliteration: Hatha ma tooAAadoona likulli awwabin hafeethin

ayahs.arabic: مَّنۡ خَشِيَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنَ بِٱلۡغَيۡبِ وَجَآءَ بِقَلۡبٖ مُّنِيبٍ
ayahs.translation: Who feared the Most Merciful unseen and came with a heart returning [in repentance]
ayahs.transliteration: Man khashiya alrrahmana bialghaybi wajaa biqalbin muneebin

ayahs.arabic: ٱدۡخُلُوهَا بِسَلَٰمٖۖ ذَٰلِكَ يَوۡمُ ٱلۡخُلُودِ
ayahs.translation: Enter it in peace. This is the Day of Eternity
ayahs.transliteration: Odkhulooha bisalamin thalika yawmu alkhuloodi

ayahs.arabic: لَهُم مَّا يَشَآءُونَ فِيهَا وَلَدَيۡنَا مَزِيدٞ
ayahs.translation: They will have whatever they wish therein, and with Us is more
ayahs.transliteration: Lahum ma yashaoona feeha waladayna mazeedun

ayahs.arabic: وَكَمۡ أَهۡلَكۡنَا قَبۡلَهُم مِّن قَرۡنٍ هُمۡ أَشَدُّ مِنۡهُم بَطۡشٗا فَنَقَّبُواْ فِي ٱلۡبِلَٰدِ هَلۡ مِن مَّحِيصٍ
ayahs.translation: And how many a generation before them did We destroy who were greater than them in [striking] power and had explored throughout the lands. Is there any place of escape
ayahs.transliteration: Wakam ahlakna qablahum min qarnin hum ashaddu minhum batshan fanaqqaboo fee albiladi hal min maheesin

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكۡرَىٰ لِمَن كَانَ لَهُۥ قَلۡبٌ أَوۡ أَلۡقَى ٱلسَّمۡعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدٞ
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a reminder for whoever has a heart or who listens while he is present [in mind]
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika lathikra liman kana lahu qalbun aw alqa alssamAAa wahuwa shaheedun

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا فِي سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٖ وَمَا مَسَّنَا مِن لُّغُوبٖ
ayahs.translation: And We did certainly create the heavens and earth and what is between them in six days, and there touched Us no weariness
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad khalaqna alssamawati waalarda wama baynahuma fee sittati ayyamin wama massana min lughoobin

ayahs.arabic: فَٱصۡبِرۡ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ قَبۡلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمۡسِ وَقَبۡلَ ٱلۡغُرُوبِ
ayahs.translation: So be patient, [O Muhammad], over what they say and exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before its setting
ayahs.transliteration: Faisbir AAala ma yaqooloona wasabbih bihamdi rabbika qabla tulooAAi alshshamsi waqabla alghuroobi

ayahs.arabic: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ فَسَبِّحۡهُ وَأَدۡبَٰرَ ٱلسُّجُودِ
ayahs.translation: And [in part] of the night exalt Him and after prostration
ayahs.transliteration: Wamina allayli fasabbihhu waadbara alssujoodi

ayahs.arabic: وَٱسۡتَمِعۡ يَوۡمَ يُنَادِ ٱلۡمُنَادِ مِن مَّكَانٖ قَرِيبٖ
ayahs.translation: And listen on the Day when the Caller will call out from a place that is near
ayahs.transliteration: WaistamiAA yawma yunadi almunadi min makanin qareebin

ayahs.arabic: يَوۡمَ يَسۡمَعُونَ ٱلصَّيۡحَةَ بِٱلۡحَقِّۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوۡمُ ٱلۡخُرُوجِ
ayahs.translation: The Day they will hear the blast [of the Horn] in truth. That is the Day of Emergence [from the graves]
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma yasmaAAoona alssayhata bialhaqqi thalika yawmu alkhurooji

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا نَحۡنُ نُحۡيِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَإِلَيۡنَا ٱلۡمَصِيرُ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, it is We who give life and cause death, and to Us is the destination
ayahs.transliteration: Inna nahnu nuhyee wanumeetu wailayna almaseeru

ayahs.arabic: يَوۡمَ تَشَقَّقُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ عَنۡهُمۡ سِرَاعٗاۚ ذَٰلِكَ حَشۡرٌ عَلَيۡنَا يَسِيرٞ
ayahs.translation: On the Day the earth breaks away from them [and they emerge] rapidly; that is a gathering easy for Us
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma tashaqqaqu alardu AAanhum siraAAan thalika hashrun AAalayna yaseerun

ayahs.arabic: نَّحۡنُ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيۡهِم بِجَبَّارٖۖ فَذَكِّرۡ بِٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ مَن يَخَافُ وَعِيدِ
ayahs.translation: We are most knowing of what they say, and you are not over them a tyrant. But remind by the Qur'an whoever fears My threat
ayahs.transliteration: Nahnu aAAlamu bima yaqooloona wama anta AAalayhim bijabbarin fathakkir bialqurani man yakhafu waAAeedi
